creator: lx@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Couple of comments: 

- Portlint finds a space/tab mixup and requests USE_LDCONFIG. I'll go ahead 
and make those changes. 

- Other than being used by amarok, I don't think this has anything to do 
with KDE. Is it ok for me to remove that from the categories? 

Thanks! 
lx
